song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
How am I supposed to live without you (M.Bolton)
                                  (by Hendrik Helmer)

[Intro]    [ch]Eb[/ch]^  [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]  -- [ch]Eb[/ch]^    [ch]Dm7[/ch]   ([ch]D7b9[/ch])   [ch]Bb[/ch]   

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
        I could hardly believe it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F/A[/ch]
        when I heard the news today[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Eb/G[/ch]            [ch]F#7[/ch]                   [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   ([ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb/D[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch])
        I had to come and get it straight from you.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
        They said you where leaving,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F/A[/ch]
        someone swept you heart away.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Eb/G[/ch]          [ch]F#7[/ch] [ch]Bb/F[/ch]       [ch]Emb5[/ch]  [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   /[ch]Eb[/ch]
        From that look on your face I see it's true.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]                                                 [ch]Eb[/ch]^
        So tell me all about it, tell me about the plans your making      [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm[/ch]            [ch]F/Eb[/ch]   [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]  
        Tell me one thing more before I go:[/tab]

[tab][Chorus]         [ch]Eb[/ch]^                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]  
        Tell me  how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]^                                  [ch]Dm7[/ch] ([ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch])
           Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]^                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
        How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]^           [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   ([ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch])
        and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 [ch]F/Eb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]             
        when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]

[Interlude] / [ch]Eb[/ch]^  / [ch]Dm7[/ch]   ([ch]D7b9[/ch])   / [ch]Bb[/ch] /  

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
        Too tired for crying[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F/A[/ch]
        Didnt come here to break down[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]                 [ch]F#7[/ch]          [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   (Eb [ch]B/D[/ch] Cm)
        Its just a dream of mine thats coming to an end[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
        How I can I blame you,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F/A[/ch]
        When I built my world around[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb/G[/ch]               [ch]F#7[/ch]       [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]Emb5[/ch]   [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  /[ch]Eb[/ch]   
        the hope that one day we would be so much more then friends.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]                                             [ch]Eb[/ch]^
       I dont wanna know the price I am gonna pay for dreaming.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm[/ch]             [ch]F/Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
       Even now its more than I can take [/tab]

[tab][Chorus]         [ch]Eb[/ch]^                          [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Gm[/ch]  
        Tell me  how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Eb[/ch]^                                 [ch]Dm7[/ch] ([ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch])
        Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Eb[/ch]^                         [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Gm[/ch]
        How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]   [ch]Bb/D[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]^          [ch]Eb/F[/ch]   ([ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch])
        and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]^/[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Eb[/ch]^    [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]^ 
        when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]

[Solo] (Michael Landau)
/ [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]^/[ch]D[/ch]   / [ch]Eb[/ch]^   [ch]F[/ch] /  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]  / [ch]F[/ch]   (Eb/G  [ch]F/A[/ch] ) /                     
/ [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]^/[ch]D[/ch]   / [ch]Eb[/ch]^   [ch]F[/ch] /  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F/A[/ch] /  [ch]B/F#[/ch]     [ch]F#[/ch]    //

[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]B/D#[/ch]                                             [ch]E[/ch]^
    Now I dont wanna know the price I'm gonna pay for dreaming,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]                   [ch]E/F#[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]            
       now that your dream has come true.[/tab]

[tab][Chorus]        [ch]E[/ch]^                        [ch]D#m7[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]  
        Tell me  how am I supposed to live without you.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]^                                 [ch]D#m7[/ch] ([ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch])
        Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]^                          [ch]D#m7[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]
        How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]B/D#[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]^           [ch]E/F#[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch]
        and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]B/D#[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]^         
        when all that I've been living for is gone.[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]^                        [ch]D#m7[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]  
                             Gone without you.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]^                                 [ch]D#m7[/ch] ([ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch])
        Now that I've been loving you so long.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]^                          [ch]D#m7[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]
        How am I supposed to live without you,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]B/D#[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]^           [ch]E/F#[/ch]    [ch]G#m[/ch]
        and how am I supposed to carry on,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]B/D#[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]^/([ch]C#[/ch]) [ch]F[/ch]   
        when all that I've been living  for is gone.[/tab]

[Outro]
        [ch]E[/ch]^  [ch]D#m7[/ch]  [ch]C#m7[/ch](11)  [ch]Badd9[/ch]
